title: Discharge Instructions

segments.text: Before you leave, I want to go over your discharge instructions.
Continue the pain medication as prescribed, but try to wean off it within a week.
Keep the wound dry for forty-eight hours.
After that, you can shower normally.
Avoid heavy lifting for two weeks.
We've scheduled a follow-up appointment for next Tuesday.
If you notice increased redness, swelling, or fever, please contact us straight away.

If you notice increased redness, swelling, or fever, please contact us straight away.
